summary: Project for TRI-GITA SERVICES — a finance/subsidy presentation or website. Features bank finance section with animations, subsidy structure section, office address, and service area information.

existing_features.title: Add scroll-triggered entrance animations to the subsidy structure section in OdishaGuide.tsx. The subsidy tier table rows and related elements should animate in with fade-in and slide-up effects using IntersectionObserver (consistent with the BankFinanceBanner animation pattern). Include prefers-reduced-motion support.

Add TRI-GITA SERVICES office address to the Footer component. The address is: Shri Hari Niwas, Dengimacha, Near Dengimacha Ministadium, Sambalpur, Odisha 768006. Display it alongside the existing contact details.

Add a 'Service Area: Odisha' entry to the Footer component and/or a relevant section (such as WhyChooseUs or a dedicated info block). Display it clearly so users know the geographic coverage of TRI-GITA SERVICES.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add animation to the subsidy structure section
Add TRI-GITA SERVICES office address: Shri Hari Niwas, Dengimacha, Near Dengimacha Ministadium, Sambalpur, Odisha 768006
